items.caption: A slide from a presentation with a red and white color scheme. it has a title at the top that reads "the role of mentors" in a bold white font on a red background. below the title, there is a bullet-pointed list in white text on a red background that outlines the role of mentors. the list states that mentors provide extra support for teachers to manage the logistics of a number of groups simultaneously refining questions that can readily be investigated, provide real examples of how scientific investigations are conducted and impact on our society, and provide a real context for sustained communication. the slide also includes a small yellow emoji-like icon next to the second bullet point. the background of the slide has a geometric pattern with red and white shapes.
